title: Get Comfortable with Git - Study Group
description: For those who want time to practice, ask questions or just work with others who are learning Git.

title: Test your Git skills
description: In this interactive lab, you'll put your git skills to the test with real scenarios.

title: TDD Intro – Why, How & AI
description: We'll be covering why TDD is useful, how to get started using it, and the role that TDD plays in an AI-assisted world.

title: Quarterly Career Review Session
description: Whether you're working towards a promotion, holding tight or on a break, these sessions create spaceto track progress, reflect and inspire insights

title: Ad Clickstream Architecture Kata
description: How would you design the data platform behind a high-volume ad clickstream? Our first Architecture Kata for 2026 is here, and we’re tackling a common interview scenario - covering scale, speed, real-time processing.

title: TDD Intro cycle
description: Recap the Hows & Whys of TDD and start practicing. We’ll do 2-3 practice katas and you’ll come away with the ability to continue practicing on your own or with an AI tool.
